suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a lightweight path for small scoped rename fix-ups so workers are not required to add new red tests when existing validator coverage already verifies the change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature fix-docker-smoke-rename required straightforward string substitutions across Docker smoke files; reviewer observation and worker skill feedback indicate the mandatory tests-first step created unnecessary process overhead versus the repo's existing validation commands.

rejectedObservations.observation: `rename-worker` should stop requiring rg tooling in this environment.
